problem id: 6e2311e1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  10110101 -> 10000010
  00001110 -> 00000000
  10110100 -> 00000010
  00101100 -> 00000000
  10000110 -> 00000010
  01010100 -> 00000000
  11001110 -> 00000011
  01010000 -> 00000000
  11110001 -> 10000000

query: 11011001
predicted answer: 10000000
